evals.intent: build a profile from the example and validate it
evals.expect: status profile_written; roles non-empty; gitignored true

evals.intent: a profile with no display_name / no roles is rejected
evals.input: answers with empty teacher.display_name and roles=[]
evals.expect: status invalid; issues include display_name and at least one role

evals.intent: register emits a classroom sop_ref + overrides + role map
evals.expect: sop_refs[0].scope == classroom; role_interaction_map present; human_review_required true

evals.intent: a handoff missing counterparty_role fails validation
evals.input: answers with a handoff lacking counterparty_role
evals.expect: status invalid; issues include handoff[..] missing counterparty_role
